overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in period clothing walking through a foggy industrial dock area at dusk. The character moves from a narrow cobblestone alley between warehouses onto a wooden dock, approaching a moored boat in the misty harbor.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow cobblestone alley between industrial warehouses

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the narrow cobblestone passage between tall warehouse buildings

entered.detail: stacked wooden shipping crates and boxes lining the right side of the alley
tall brick wall of an industrial warehouse building with weathered texture
wet cobblestone pavement with scattered debris and papers
large metal crane structure silhouetted against the foggy sky

segments.scene_description: Walking through a narrow cobblestone alley between tall industrial warehouse buildings. Wooden crates line the right side while the path leads toward a foggy harbor visible in the distance. The atmosphere is dim and moody with cool blue-purple dusk lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden dock walkway with view of foggy harbor

events.description: ground surface transitions from cobblestone to wooden planks as the alley opens to the harbor

agents.ego_description: walking onto the wooden dock planks toward the misty water and harbor beyond

entered.detail: weathered wooden dock planks forming the walking surface
misty harbor water with low visibility and atmospheric fog
lit torch mounted on a post providing warm orange light
wooden fence or barrier along the left edge of the dock

segments.scene_description: Moving from the cobblestone alley onto a wooden plank dock walkway. The environment opens to reveal a foggy harbor with industrial cranes in the background. A burning torch on the right provides warm contrast to the cool ambient lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: dock edge with moored wooden boat

events.description: character reaches the dock edge and approaches the moored boat

agents.ego_description: approaching the edge of the dock where a wooden boat is moored in the water

entered.detail: small wooden rowboat moored alongside the dock
coiled rope lying on the wooden dock surface
the edge of the wooden dock where it meets the water

segments.scene_description: Approaching the edge of the wooden dock where a small boat is moored in the water. The character walks to the dock edge overlooking the boat, with rope coils visible on the right and the foggy harbor extending into the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic industrial alleyway out toward the open, misty expanse of a harbor at dusk. It begins by navigating a narrow cobblestone path flanked by tall warehouse buildings and wooden crates under a dim, cool blue-purple light. As the camera moves forward, the alley opens onto a wooden plank dock, shifting the perspective to reveal towering industrial cranes emerging from the fog and a burning torch that casts a warm glow against the ambient chill. The scene then progresses along the walkway toward the water's edge, passing coils of rope before finally coming to a halt overlooking a small boat moored in the hazy harbor.
